name: Easy Cobbler
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the flour, sugar, baking powder, and milk until well combined.
2. Stir in the pinch of salt.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased 9x13 inch pan.
4. Spread the mixture evenly.
5. Add your favorite pie filling on top and spread it out.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 to 40 minutes, or until golden brown.
